blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.5 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,278 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 19.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 53".
